# Add a global, presentation-only panel

The panel mounts previously-declared controls by bind id (see
[`section()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/section.md)
and
[`sections()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/sections.md)).

## Usage

``` r
add_panel(
  map,
  title = NULL,
  description = NULL,
  icon = NULL,
  dividers = TRUE,
  position = NULL,
  sections = NULL
)
```

## Arguments

- map:

  A maplamina widget created by
  [`maplamina()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/maplamina.md).

- title:

  Panel title.

- description:

  Optional panel description.

- icon:

  Optional URL for a small icon shown beside the title.

- dividers:

  Logical; whether to render divider lines between sections.

- position:

  Optional corner position for the panel container: `"topleft"`,
  `"topright"`, `"bottomleft"`, `"bottomright"`.

- sections:

  Panel layout, created with `sections(section("id"), ...)`.

## Value

The modified map widget.

## Examples

``` r
d <- data.frame(
  lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),
  lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),
  value = runif(1000, 1, 10)
)
maplamina() |>
  add_circles(d) |>
  add_filters(filter_range(~value), bind = "filters") |>
  add_panel(sections = sections(section("filters")))

{"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"circle1":{"id":"circle1","type":"circle","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"radius":{"value":6},"lineWidth":{"value":1},"fillColor":{"value":[30,144,255,204]},"lineColor":{"value":[0,0,139,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":true,"radiusUnits":"pixels","lineWidthUnits":"pixels"},"bbox":[-59.92366086691618,-59.82156397774816,59.96094376780093,59.83399232849479],"coordinate_origin":null,"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_d5d40fdb27271a79":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000},"blob_7df66538231707ee":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":1000}},"refs":{"position":"blob_d5d40fdb27271a79","flt.rng_1.values":"blob_7df66538231707ee"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":{"rng_1":{"type":"range","id":"rng_1","layer":"circle1","bind":"filters","position":null,"label":"value","default":null,"min":1.004920206498355,"max":9.992317774100229,"step":null,"live":true,"values":{"ref":"flt.rng_1.values"},"values_ref_hint":"flt.rng_1.values"}},"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":{"filters":{"type":"filters","controls":{"value":{"type":"range","label":"value","members":["rng_1"],"domain":{"min":1.004920206498355,"max":9.992317774100229},"live":true}},"order":["value"]}},".__panel":{"title":null,"description":null,"icon":null,"dividers":true,"position":null,"sections":[{"id":"filters"}]}},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}
```
